---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
format: html
page-layout: custom
#header-includes: >
#  <link rel="stylesheet" href="_assets/index.css">
#resources:
#  - _assets/index.css
---





```{=html}
<!-- Include the CSS -->
<style>
  :root {
    --vh: 100vh; /* Fallback for unsupported browsers */
  }

  /* Full-page Hero Section */
  .hero {
    position: relative;
    width: 100vw;
    height: calc(var(--vh, 1vh) * 100); /* Dynamic height using JS for mobile */
    background: url('../images/block-banner.gif') no-repeat center center / cover;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Transparent Container for Text */
  .hero-content {
    background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); /* Subtle transparency */
    padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
    border-radius: 10px;
    max-width: 800px;
    color: white; /* Ensure visibility on the GIF */
  }

  /* Typography */
  .hero-content h1 {
    font-size: 4rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .hero-content h2 {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }

  /* Responsive Adjustments */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero-content h1 {
      font-size: 2.5rem;
    }
    .hero-content h2 {
      font-size: 1rem;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 576px) {
    .hero-content h1 {
      font-size: 2rem;
    }
    .hero-content h2 {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }
  }
</style>

<!-- JavaScript to Fix Mobile Viewport Height -->
<script>
  function setVH() {
    let vh = window.innerHeight * 0.01;
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--vh', `${vh}px`);
  }
  setVH();
  window.addEventListener('resize', setVH);
</script>

<!-- Hero Section -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1>Abdelkarim el Ghani</h1>
    <h2>Statistical Data Analyst | Neuroscientist | Pharmacology Enthusiast</h2>
    <div>
      <a href="projects.qmd" class="btn btn-primary">Explore Projects</a>
      <a href="about.qmd" class="btn btn-secondary">About Me</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>



```






[Code The Web](https://codetheweb.blog/fullscreen-image-hero/){tab="_blank"}
